steps.title: Identify the temporal context
steps.content: The sentence opens with “On March 27, 2004”—establishing that the described action is completed and in the past.

steps.title: Apply the correct verb tense
steps.content:
”Finished” is the simple past tense form, which correctly expresses an action completed at a specific time in the past. The other choices use incorrect tenses: base form (A) is ungrammatical, present perfect progressive (B) implies ongoing action, and future progressive (D) contradicts the 2004 date.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
